'''Velpar Raftin''' was a thin, hawk-faced and quite ambitious [[Human/Legends|Human]], who served as the [[planetary commandant]] of [[Sevarcos II]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Background==
He was appointed planetary commandant when the former commandant failed to stop a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] ring from using his own Imperial [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] to smuggle [[Spice/Legends|spice]] off-planet. Originally Raftin worked in the [[Sector Plexus/Legends|Sector Plexus]] [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Intelligence]] network as a [[Security Major]]. While investigating the previous commandant, Security Major Raftin obtained access to vital information regarding the local smuggling trade and managed to put a stop to many small time smugglers. This impressed his superiors so much that they promoted him to planetary commandant.

==Implementations==
Upon his promotion he ordered several new Imperial garrisons built, especially along the traditional trade routes of the [[Sevari]], much to the dismay of the [[spice lord]]s. He also implemented a broad plan including intrinsic investigations and check of his own customs officers, frequent drilling of prison security, and a reformation of close-orbit tactics. He was worried about the power of the local spice lords and opined that the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor]] should strip them of their territories and subject the entire planet to Imperial rule, giving Raftin full [[Governor/Legends|governorship]] of the planet. As planetary commandant, he had direct access to all military material and governed all military units, including the Imperial [[minetrooper]]s.
